film.title: Lakshya
film.overview: An aimless, jobless, irresponsible grown man joins the army and matures into a battlefield hero.

dialogues.dialogue: Not one business associate or friend...has a son or a brother out there. These people just talk big! But I can proudly say, my son is on the battlefield. There was a time I was upset with you but today I'm proud of you.
dialogues.cause_raw: son's bravery and service in battlefield

dialogues.dialogue: But I can proudly say, my son is on the battlefield. There was a time I was upset with you but today I'm proud of you. Very proud. Thank you, dad.
There was a time I was upset with you but today I'm proud of you. Very proud. Thank you, dad. For when the mission is successful.
